channel.title: Smith Daily Digest
channel.description: Personalized daily tech & finance audio digest
channel.itunes:author: Audio Digest Bot

item.title: Daily Digest — May 10, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 10, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-10.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-10.txt
Chapters: 0:22 — We Asked an Options Expert Why This Melt Up Hasn’t Broken — and Which Signal Cou 2:40 — We Asked a $4.5B Quant Manager Why the S&P 500 Is Just 46 Stocks — and Why Small 6:59 — We Asked a $4.5B Quant Manager Why the S&P 500 Is Just 46 Stocks — and Why Small 11:16 — Elon's Anthropic Deal, The Next AI Monopoly?, "FDA for AI" Panic, Trading the AI
Sources: - We Asked an Options Expert Why This Melt Up Hasn’t Broken — and Which Signal Could End It (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-an-Options-Expert-Why-This-Melt-Up-Hasnt-Broken--and-Which-Signal-Could-End-It-e3j5nao Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO1240198448.mp3 - We Asked a $4.5B Quant Manager Why the S&P 500 Is Just 46 Stocks — and Why Small Caps Aren't Dead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-a-4-5B-Quant-Manager-Why-the-SP-500-Is-Just-46-Stocks--and-Why-Small-Caps-Arent-Dead-e3j3bj5 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO3294194752.mp3 - Elon's Anthropic Deal, The Next AI Monopoly?, "FDA for AI" Panic, Trading the AI Boom (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/elons-anthropic-deal-the-next-ai-monopoly-fda-for-ai-panic-trading-the-ai-boom Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E272_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300

item.title: Daily Digest — May 09, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 09, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-09.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-09.txt
Chapters: 0:22 — We Asked a $4.5B Quant Manager Why the S&P 500 Is Just 46 Stocks — and Why Small 4:01 — Elon's Anthropic Deal, The Next AI Monopoly?, "FDA for AI" Panic, Trading the AI 7:57 — Winning the Degenerate Economy with StockTwits CEO Howard Lindzon 11:44 — Winning the Degenerate Economy with StockTwits CEO Howard Lindzon
Sources: - We Asked a $4.5B Quant Manager Why the S&P 500 Is Just 46 Stocks — and Why Small Caps Aren't Dead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-a-4-5B-Quant-Manager-Why-the-SP-500-Is-Just-46-Stocks--and-Why-Small-Caps-Arent-Dead-e3j3bj5 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO3294194752.mp3 - Elon's Anthropic Deal, The Next AI Monopoly?, "FDA for AI" Panic, Trading the AI Boom (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/elons-anthropic-deal-the-next-ai-monopoly-fda-for-ai-panic-trading-the-ai-boom Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E272_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Winning the Degenerate Economy with StockTwits CEO Howard Lindzon (Masters in Business) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/masters-in-business/winning-the-degenerate-economy-with-stocktwits-ceo-howard-lindzon Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/4e4cd910-40a1-4619-a5f3-ae2b0012ffff/f04b68e0-7fbf-4a3f-ba10-b444016f98a6/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=5873a3cb-298f-40bc-b71f-ae2b0013000d

item.title: Daily Digest — May 08, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 08, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-08.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-08.txt
Chapters: 0:25 — How to Find the Agent Failures Your Evals Miss with Scott Clark - #767 2:47 — Ben Horowitz on the Next Technology Era 5:13 — Defendant, Censor, Politico, Spy
Sources: - How to Find the Agent Failures Your Evals Miss with Scott Clark - #767 (The TWIML AI Podcast (formerly This Week in Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence)) Link: https://twimlai.com/podcast/twimlai/how-find-agent-failures-your-evals-miss Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/traffic.megaphone.fm/MLN7498240745.mp3?updated=1778194521 - Ben Horowitz on the Next Technology Era (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/ben-horowitz-on-the-next-technology-era-aoL5sxwd Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/ddaa2bb3-7e85-40b7-a124-89b8e4ae0935/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=ddaa2bb3-7e85-40b7-a124-89b8e4ae0935&feed=JGE3yC0V - Defendant, Censor, Politico, Spy (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/defendant-censor-politico-spy/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/7ecf6cce/625f589a.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — May 07, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 07, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-07.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-07.txt
Chapters: 0:25 — Crypto Fund 5: We Raised $2.2B. Here’s Why. 2:49 — Crypto Fund 5: We Raised $2.2B. Here’s Why. 5:09 — Tracy Chou (Block Party) - Founding a Mission-Driven Startup 6:46 — Tracy Chou (Block Party) - Founding a Mission-Driven Startup 9:08 — #496 – FFmpeg: The Incredible Technology Behind Video on the Internet
Sources: - Crypto Fund 5: We Raised $2.2B. Here’s Why. (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/crypto-fund-5-we-raised-22b-heres-why-___CC391 Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/6b916643-4256-4a9d-9496-a74f5adaeea9/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=6b916643-4256-4a9d-9496-a74f5adaeea9&feed=JGE3yC0V - Tracy Chou (Block Party) - Founding a Mission-Driven Startup (Entrepreneurial Thought Leaders (ETL)) Source audio: https://rss.art19.com/episodes/91676bac-a8f9-4ef3-b0de-756795bdc9b3.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - #496 – FFmpeg: The Incredible Technology Behind Video on the Internet (Lex Fridman Podcast) Link: https://lexfridman.com/ffmpeg/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ffmpeg Source audio: https://media.blubrry.com/takeituneasy/ins.blubrry.com/takeituneasy/lex_ai_ffmpeg.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — May 06, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 06, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-06.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-06.txt
Chapters: 0:27 — You're Wrong All the Time, But All You Need Are Better Explanations 3:24 — You're Wrong All the Time, But All You Need Are Better Explanations 7:44 — Was Adam Smith Really a Right-Winger? (Update) 13:01 — Was Adam Smith Really a Right-Winger? (Update) 18:24 — We Asked Rich Bernstein and Chris Davis Why This Market Isn’t as Safe as It Feel 23:42 — We Asked Rich Bernstein and Chris Davis Why This Market Isn’t as Safe as It Feel
Sources: - You're Wrong All the Time, But All You Need Are Better Explanations (Developer Tea) Link: http://www.developertea.com Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/cdn.simplecast.com/audio/c44db111-b60d-436e-ab63-38c7c3402406/episodes/2080e0c3-7dc3-41af-85a4-8fd64b29c7f9/audio/eea232ef-b5a3-42f1-ac38-8ae97c6e75cc/default_tc.mp3?aid=rss_feed&feed=dLRotFGk - Was Adam Smith Really a Right-Winger? (Update) (Freakonomics Radio) Link: https://freakonomics.com Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/2/pdst.fm/e/dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/stitcher.simplecastaudio.com/2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e/episodes/687028d5-b80b-48ae-93da-df91a8c71648/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e&awEpisodeId=687028d5-b80b-48ae-93da-df91a8c71648&feed=Y8lFbOT4 - We Asked Rich Bernstein and Chris Davis Why This Market Isn’t as Safe as It Feels (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-Rich-Bernstein-and-Chris-Davis-Why-This-Market-Isnt-as-Safe-as-It-Feels-e3is630 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2572111451.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — May 01, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — May 01, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-05-01.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-05-01.txt
Chapters: 0:26 — How the SPLC became financial infrastructure 3:06 — Why Bonds Are Back: PIMCO’s Marc Seidner on the Best Fixed Income Setup in Years 5:06 — How to Engineer AI Inference Systems with Philip Kiely - #766
Sources: - How the SPLC became financial infrastructure (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/splc-financial-infrastructure/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/9957f3d7/8d0e3bf4.mp3 - Why Bonds Are Back: PIMCO’s Marc Seidner on the Best Fixed Income Setup in Years | #629 (The Meb Faber Show - Better Investing) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/TIFM5072255151.mp3?updated=1777465630 - How to Engineer AI Inference Systems with Philip Kiely - #766 (The TWIML AI Podcast (formerly This Week in Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence)) Link: https://twimlai.com/podcast/twimlai/how-engineer-ai-inference-systems Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/traffic.megaphone.fm/MLN3829343846.mp3?updated=1777581088
